novel_features.name: Multi-Source Ratings Dashboard
novel_features.description: See TMDb, IMDb, Rotten Tomatoes, and Metacritic ratings for any movie in one view
novel_features.rationale: Requires combining TMDb API details with OMDb enrichment — no single API provides all four rating sources

novel_features.name: Where to Watch
novel_features.description: Find every streaming platform, rental option, and purchase option for any movie or show
novel_features.rationale: TMDb provides watch provider data that no existing CLI surfaces in a usable format

novel_features.name: Career Timeline
novel_features.description: Explore any actor or director's complete filmography with ratings and career trajectory
novel_features.rationale: Requires combining person credits with per-title details across TMDb + OMDb ratings

novel_features.name: Tonight Picker
novel_features.description: Get a smart recommendation for what to watch tonight based on trending and your streaming services
novel_features.rationale: Combines trending data, discover filters, and watch provider availability in a single decision flow

novel_features.name: Head-to-Head Compare
novel_features.description: Compare two movies or shows side-by-side across every metric: ratings, cast, box office, streaming
novel_features.rationale: No single API call compares titles — requires fetching and aligning details from both TMDb and OMDb

novel_features.name: Marathon Planner
novel_features.description: Plan a franchise movie marathon with watch order, total runtime, and suggested breaks
novel_features.rationale: Requires fetching TMDb collection data and computing cumulative runtime across all entries
